# PROJECT.md — FoodSphere Multi-Tenant Platform Overview
## Auto-generated — 2026-07-21
### Detected from codebase scan

- **Project Name**: FoodSphere
- **Architecture**: Multi-tenant Restaurant Aggregator (1 App + Admin HQ + 7 Restaurant Websites)
- **Frontend Stack**: 
  - Admin Panel: React 18, Vite, Tailwind CSS v3, Lucide React
  - Mobile App: React Native, Expo, Redux Toolkit
  - 7 Brand Websites: React / HTML5, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend Stack**: Python 3.11, Django 6.0, Django REST Framework, SimpleJWT
- **Database & Storage**: PostgreSQL (Production) / SQLite (Dev), Cloudinary (Media Storage)
- **Live URLs**:
  - Backend API: https://restaurant-app-web.onrender.com
  - Admin HQ: https://foodsphere-admin.pages.dev
